repair_candidate.pr_body: No replacement PR should be opened for this cluster. Current main at ae655345c436c8fbc93cee093090382341287825 already contains the request-scoped plugin workspace-dir pin from source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/90819, including the listSessionsFromStoreAsync withPinnedActivePluginRegistryWorkspaceDir wrapping and runtime workspace-state regression coverage. Credit and attribution remain with @k-l-lambda and the source PR; if this regression reappears, use #90819, #90814, and the existing tests as the audit trail.
